text.title: microservices-design Worked Examples
text.summary: One full end-to-end example of microservices-design applied to a representative input.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: Bounded contexts: orders, payments, inventory. Three squads. Independent deploys required for checkout flash sales.

example.note: orders calls payments synchronously (HTTP) with a circuit breaker; orders publishes OrderPlaced to inventory async.
